title: Wilted Hearty Uruguayan Cabbage Bake
description: A classic Uruguayan dish featuring wilted cabbage, rest-meat, and a blend of spices, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the tomato paste, chili flakes, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the shredded cabbage to the skillet and cook until it starts to wilt.
Transfer the cabbage mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle the bread crumbs evenly over the top of the cabbage mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cabbage is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
